criteria.name: User Engagement
criteria.description: The level of user interaction and time spent on the app.
criteria.sources: App analytics platforms, user reviews, and app store metrics.

criteria.name: Content Quality
criteria.description: The variety, exclusivity, and quality of the content offered.
criteria.sources: Expert reviews, user feedback, and content library analysis.

criteria.name: AI Integration
criteria.description: The extent and effectiveness of AI features such as personalized recommendations, voice assistants, and content discovery tools.
criteria.sources: App feature lists, user reviews, and tech blogs.

criteria.name: User Interface and Experience
criteria.description: The design, ease of use, and overall user experience of the app.
criteria.sources: User reviews, UI/UX design awards, and expert critiques.

criteria.name: Subscription and Pricing Models
criteria.description: The cost and value offered by the app's subscription plans and pricing models.
criteria.sources: App store listings, financial reports, and user feedback.
